commit.message:
docs: remove obsolete CLOUDFLARE-PAGES.md (legacy deployment doc)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add custom time control, service worker, move time stats

Custom time control:
- Two number inputs (1-180 min, 0-60 sec) in a "Custom" section
  below presets on the setup screen
- Typing auto-selects the custom control, presets deselect
- Inputs highlight with accent border when custom is active
- Persistence upgraded from label string to JSON {m, i} format
  with backwards-compatible restore from old format

Service worker (offline PWA):
- Network-first for navigation, cache-first for assets
- Pre-caches shell (/, index.html, manifest, icon) on install
- Falls back to cached index.html when offline
- Old caches cleaned on activate
- Registered on window load in main.tsx

Move time stats:
- Tracks per-player move times via ref (no extra re-renders)
- Last move time shown in info line: "3 mv · 8.2s"
- Formatted as Xs (< 10s with decimal), Xs (< 60s), XmYs (longer)
- Resets on game reset

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(manifest): add orientation + min_viewport_width

Required by the viewport-support compliance check. Without these,
'fas check' on this app fails. Defaults to 'any' orientation and 360
px min viewport width.

docs(CLAUDE): adopt slim per-repo shape

Refactors this CLAUDE.md to the slim convention documented in
SKILLS.md. Platform-wide knowledge (tech stack, brand, deploy,
mobile rules, paths) lives in SKILLS.md as the single source of
truth -- duplicating it per repo just creates drift surface area
that breaks AI agents over time. This file now only carries
what is unique to this repo.

Initial scaffold: Todo app for FreeAppStore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
docs: update CLAUDE.md — R2 not CF Pages

feat: mobile quick-switcher, storage quota guard, friendlier empty state

- Mobile header now has a 🔎 button (alongside + New) that opens the
  ⌘K quick switcher — previously the feature was desktop-only
- saveNotes throws StorageQuotaError on QuotaExceededError; App catches
  it and shows a persistent banner with a one-click "Backup now" so the
  user can get their data out before triaging. Previously silent.
- First-run state replaces the bare "No pages yet" line with a welcome
  card explaining the app + a primary "Create your first page" button

feat: unit converter, haptic feedback, undo (Ctrl+Z), landscape auto-scientific

Unit converter: new tab with 5 categories (length, weight, temperature,
volume, speed). Select from/to units, type a value, see live conversion.
Swap button flips direction and carries the result. Accessible via bottom
tab bar on mobile, sidebar toggle on desktop.

Haptic feedback: 8ms vibration pulse on every button press via
navigator.vibrate() — felt on mobile, no-op on desktop.

Undo: Ctrl+Z / Cmd+Z reverts the last calculator action. Up to 30 undo
levels stored in a ref-based stack (not persisted across reloads).

Landscape auto-scientific: on phones in landscape (max-height: 500px),
scientific buttons + parentheses automatically appear in a side-by-side
layout regardless of the mode toggle. Portrait restores the user's
chosen mode.

Tests expanded from 122 → 155 with 33 new conversion tests covering
all 5 categories, edge cases (zero, negative, unknown unit → NaN),
and round-trip accuracy.

docs: update CLAUDE.md — R2 not CF Pages

Extract storage module, add 54 tests, fix small bugs

- New web/src/storage.ts holds Phrase/Pair/Contrast/Tab types,
  storage keys, loaders, validators, and ID generation. App.tsx
  imports from there, no more inline pure functions.
- Add storage.test.ts (44 cases): seed fallback, v1→v2 migration,
  range validation for speech rate / font scale, contrast/tab
  enum guards, ID uniqueness.
- Expand app.test.tsx (12 cases): tab persistence, aria-current,
  contrast attribute toggle, font-scale style application, pair
  switcher relabels form, full add-phrase flow writes to storage.
- Add @testing-library/react cleanup in setup to prevent test
  state leaks between renders.
- Fix: justAdded setTimeout now cleaned up on unmount via ref.
- Polish: aria-current="page" + aria-label on bottom nav buttons
  for accessibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add contrast setting (normal/high/max) for low-light readability

Default dark-mode --muted (#9ca3af) fades into the background when
the room is dim. New Contrast setting in Settings tab applies a
data-contrast attribute on <html>; CSS overrides bump --muted and
--line strength at high/max levels, in both light and dark mode.

Persisted to localStorage. Defaults to normal so existing users
see no change unless they opt in.

Multi-step posting flow with rules + confirm + preloaded moderation

Flow: Rules → Camera → "Are you sure? You can only post one!" → Moderate → Upload

- Rules screen explains all 5 rules before camera opens
- AI models preload in background while user reads rules
- Confirmation step: "You can only post one face. This is it — forever on the wall."
- Moderation runs only after user confirms
- On failure, shows reason and offers Retake
- preloadModels() exported from moderate.ts for early background loading

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add number formats and conditional formatting

Number formats (toolbar dropdown):
- Auto (default behavior)
- Currency: $1,234.56
- Percent: 12.34% (multiplies by 100)
- Decimal: 1234.56 (forces 2 decimals)

Per-cell, persists with other formats.

Conditional formatting:
- Rules button in toolbar (highlights when rules exist)
- Dialog to add/remove rules per sheet
- Rule types: greater than, less than, equals, contains, between (1..10)
- Custom bg color, text color, and bold for matching cells
- Last matching rule wins
- Conditional format overrides cell format but loses to selection/find highlights

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Close gaps: string literals, cross-sheet refs, header context menus

Formula engine:
- String literals in formulas: =SUBSTITUTE(A1,"old","new") works
- splitArgs respects quoted commas: LEN("a,b,c") = 5
- Escaped quotes: "a""b" → a"b
- Cross-sheet refs: =Sheet2!A1, =SUM(Sheet2!A1:A10)
- Case-insensitive sheet names (Excel convention)
- Circular detection across sheets

Headers:
- Right-click column header → context menu (insert/delete/sort)
- Right-click row header → context menu (insert/delete/freeze)
- Left-click column/row header → selects entire column/row

10 new tests added (109 total, all passing).

fix: add packageManager field to fix CI deploy

pnpm/action-setup@v4 requires packageManager in package.json to know
which pnpm version to install. Without it, the deploy workflow fails
at the pnpm setup step.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 8 bugs — safe storage, map leak, stale prefs, session validation

1. localStorage crash in Safari private mode — safe-storage wrappers
2. Unbounded lastScreens Map — prune on setWatchList
3. replayCurrentScreens without room state check
4. Auto-translate fires with stale prefs — refs + prefsLoaded gate
5. Session ID validation (alphanumeric + hyphens, 1-32 chars)
6. CopyLine setTimeout not cleared on unmount
7. compose() missing AbortController
8. Bridge dist rebuild

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 3 bugs — false busy detection, chunk leak, empty input guard

1. Agent state false positive: status words like "Reading" or
   "Writing" in Claude's response text caused detectState to report
   busy even when idle at a prompt. Fix: check prompt indicators
   first (ready beats status words), only use ctrl+c as the
   unambiguous busy signal that overrides a prompt. Also limit
   status word matching to the last 5 lines of screen.

2. Stale chunk memory leak: partial multi-chunk messages that
   never completed (lost chunks) accumulated in the chunks map
   forever. Fix: 30-second timeout cleanup interval evicts
   incomplete entries.

3. extractResponse with empty userInput: ''.includes('') is always
   true, matching every line and returning nothing useful.
   Fix: early return with full capture for empty/whitespace input.

Tests: 117 → 121 (+4 new)
